summary.en: Recurring payments solution that lets businesses in India collect from bank accounts via paperless NACH Debit.
summary.zh: 讓印度企業透過無紙化 NACH 自動扣款直接從銀行帳戶收取定期款項的解決方案。

highlight.en: Handles loan repayments, subscriptions, tuition and donations of any fixed or variable amount; acquired by Juspay in January 2024.
highlight.zh: 可處理貸款還款、訂閱、學費與捐款等任何固定或變動金額,並於 2024 年 1 月被 Juspay 收購。

summary.en: Building cross-platform competitive games that are easy to watch as a spectator.
summary.zh: 打造易於觀賞的跨平台競技遊戲。

highlight.en: Founded by a team drawn from Riot Games, Google, Jane Street and quantum computing labs, with Riot Games among its backers.
highlight.zh: 創辦團隊來自 Riot Games、Google、Jane Street 與量子運算實驗室,投資者包含 Riot Games。

summary.en: A marketplace that instantly matches qualified candidates with companies across recruitment agencies.
summary.zh: 在多家招聘機構之間即時媒合合格人選與企業的市集。

highlight.en: By pooling candidates from many recruiting agencies, 10by10 speeds up hiring matches instead of working through one agency at a time.
highlight.zh: 透過匯集多家招聘機構的人選,10by10 加快媒合速度,而非逐一透過單一機構。

summary.en: On-demand, by-the-minute web app help from experts over screenshare, starting at $1/min.
summary.zh: 按分鐘計費、透過螢幕共享提供的隨選 Web 應用協助,每分鐘起價 1 美元。

highlight.en: Lets users hire an expert on the spot for web design, development or software implementation help without a long-term contract.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者即時聘請專家協助網頁設計、開發或軟體導入,無需長期合約。

summary.en: Mobile-first platform democratizing access to tech careers through coding lessons and skills-based assessments.
summary.zh: 以行動裝置為主的平台,透過程式課程與技能導向測驗讓更多人取得科技職涯機會。

highlight.en: Its Py for Work product lets employers like LiveRamp, Amplitude and Factual assess candidates with real-world tasks instead of brain teasers.
highlight.zh: 其 Py for Work 產品讓 LiveRamp、Amplitude、Factual 等雇主以實務任務而非腦筋急轉彎來評估人選。

summary.en: A marketplace for collectors to browse, trade, buy and sell vinyl toys, comics and Funko Pop figures.
summary.zh: 供收藏者瀏覽、交易、買賣黑膠玩具、漫畫與 Funko Pop 公仔的市集。

highlight.en: Built for hobbyists chasing rare, unique and unusual items, with browse, trade and buy/sell features in one platform.
highlight.zh: 專為追求稀有、獨特與奇特物品的玩家打造,在單一平台整合瀏覽、交易與買賣功能。

summary.en: A social news app for spreading word quickly to a local community when something significant happens nearby.
summary.zh: 在附近發生重大事件時快速向當地社群傳播消息的社群新聞 App。

highlight.en: Started as a UC Berkeley campus safety alert tool and grew over six years to send 65 million alerts to nearly 1 million users.
highlight.zh: 源於加州大學柏克萊分校的校園安全警示工具,六年間向近百萬使用者發送 6,500 萬則警示。

summary.en: Makes temperature-responsive fabrics that change shape to insulate more in cold and less in heat.
summary.zh: 製造能隨溫度改變形狀的布料,寒冷時加厚保暖、變熱時變薄散熱。

highlight.en: Its wire- and sensor-free "intelligent insulation" came from years of interdisciplinary lab work; first launched with Ralph Lauren.
highlight.zh: 其無線材、無感測器的「智慧保暖」源自多年跨領域實驗室研究,並率先與 Ralph Lauren 合作推出。

summary.en: Hiring software for the Indian market that cuts spam and shows quick snapshots of real candidates.
summary.zh: 為印度市場打造的招聘軟體,過濾垃圾訊息並快速呈現真實人選的概況。

highlight.en: Aims to become the dominant recruitment marketplace in an Indian hiring market growing 40% year over year.
highlight.zh: 鎖定年增 40% 的印度招聘市場,目標成為主導性的招聘市集。

summary.en: A social polling app that lets teens create multiple-choice polls to share on Snapchat and Instagram stories.
summary.zh: 讓青少年建立選擇題投票並分享到 Snapchat 與 Instagram 限時動態的社群投票 App。

highlight.en: Beyond casual use, brands and influencers can run polls to gather consumer feedback on topics from cereals to Starbucks drinks.
highlight.zh: 除休閒用途外,品牌與網紅可發起投票,蒐集從早餐麥片到星巴克飲品等消費者意見。

summary.en: Develops electric-powered aircraft that reach flight speed using a jumping mechanism.
summary.zh: 開發以跳躍機制達到飛行速度的電動飛行器。

highlight.en: Aims to build a next generation of drones by replacing conventional takeoff with an electric-powered jump to flight speed.
highlight.zh: 以電動跳躍取代傳統起飛方式達到飛行速度,致力打造新一代無人機。

summary.en: A digital auction marketplace helping dealerships appraise and trade wholesale vehicles more efficiently.
summary.zh: 協助車商更有效率地估價與批發交易車輛的數位拍賣市集。

highlight.en: Positions itself as a transparent, convenient and cost-efficient platform for automotive wholesale transactions.
highlight.zh: 定位為透明、便利且具成本效益的汽車批發交易平台。

summary.en: A subscription service offering all-you-can-play access to indie PC games.
summary.zh: 提供獨立 PC 遊戲吃到飽訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Pairs a discovery system that surfaces games players will love with a model that rewards developers on quality rather than marketing budget.
highlight.zh: 結合能找出玩家喜愛遊戲的探索系統,並以品質而非行銷預算回饋開發者。

summary.en: Lets friends play daily fantasy sports together through a quick, chat-based version on Facebook Messenger.
summary.zh: 讓朋友透過 Facebook Messenger 上的快速聊天版玩每日夢幻運動。

highlight.en: Simplifies daily fantasy sports into a fast, conversational format so casual players can join in over chat.
highlight.zh: 把每日夢幻運動簡化為快速的對話形式,讓休閒玩家也能透過聊天參與。

summary.en: A free comparison tool that searches hundreds of insurance websites at once to help you choose coverage.
summary.zh: 一次搜尋數百個保險網站、協助你選擇保單的免費比價工具。

highlight.en: Acts as a personal shopping assistant for insurance, gathering the information buyers need to make the right decision.
highlight.zh: 扮演保險選購的個人助理,彙整買方做出正確決定所需的資訊。

summary.en: Develops political targeting software for advocacy groups to counter political extremism.
summary.zh: 為倡議團體開發政治目標鎖定軟體,以對抗政治極端主義。

highlight.en: Aims to defeat political extremism through strategic primary campaigns backed by its targeting platform.
highlight.zh: 以其鎖定平台支援的策略性初選行動,致力擊退政治極端主義。

summary.en: A mobile video app for holding conversations about current events.
summary.zh: 用於針對時事進行對話的行動影音 App。

highlight.en: Built on a mission to help everyone discover, create and exchange meaningful ideas toward a more just world.
highlight.zh: 以協助每個人探索、創造並交流有意義的想法、邁向更公正世界為使命。

summary.en: Provides airport fast-track, customs and concierge services in over 470 airports worldwide.
summary.zh: 在全球逾 470 座機場提供快速通關、海關與禮賓服務。

highlight.en: Meets travelers at the arrival gate to save hours across departure, arrival and transit at airports.
highlight.zh: 在抵達登機門迎接旅客,於出境、入境與轉機環節為其節省數小時。

summary.en: A backend and API for building augmented reality experiences.
summary.zh: 用於打造擴增實境體驗的後端與 API。

highlight.en: Positions itself as the most advanced augmented reality API, providing the backend infrastructure for AR apps.
highlight.zh: 定位為最先進的擴增實境 API,為 AR 應用提供後端基礎架構。

summary.en: AI for medical billing.
summary.zh: 用於醫療帳務的人工智慧。

highlight.en: Applies artificial intelligence to the medical billing process within healthcare.
highlight.zh: 將人工智慧應用於醫療產業的帳務流程。

summary.en: Automated meeting scheduling software for individuals and teams.
summary.zh: 為個人與團隊提供的自動化會議排程軟體。

highlight.en: Used by teams at companies like Uber, Shopify and Yelp to coordinate and improve their meetings.
highlight.zh: 被 Uber、Shopify、Yelp 等公司的團隊用來協調並改善會議安排。

summary.en: Natural language processing APIs that help developers build human-like language interfaces.
summary.zh: 協助開發者打造擬人化語言介面的自然語言處理 API。

highlight.en: Works toward a future where computers can genuinely understand language and communicate with people.
highlight.zh: 致力於電腦能真正理解語言並與人溝通的未來。

summary.en: Replaces drugs with software, treating chronic digestive diseases through digital therapeutics.
summary.zh: 以軟體取代藥物,透過數位療法治療慢性消化系統疾病。

highlight.en: Building the first clinically-proven digital treatment for digestive health and IBS, combining science, physicians and coaching.
highlight.zh: 打造首個經臨床驗證、結合科學、醫師與教練的消化健康與腸躁症數位療法。

summary.en: Automates lead generation and prospecting so smaller teams can run email outreach.
summary.zh: 自動化開發名單與潛在客戶探勘,讓小型團隊也能進行 Email 開發。

highlight.en: Aims to bring email outreach within reach of the long tail of sales teams by automating prospecting work.
highlight.zh: 透過自動化潛在客戶探勘,讓長尾的銷售團隊也能負擔 Email 開發。

summary.en: Software that gives patrol officers key information about people with mental illness at the scene.
summary.zh: 在現場為巡邏員警提供精神疾病患者關鍵資訊的軟體。

highlight.en: Surfaces tailored de-escalation techniques and personalized service referrals to help police and health workers act safely.
highlight.zh: 提供量身打造的緩和技巧與個人化服務轉介,協助警方與醫護人員安全處置。

summary.en: Develops affordable, accessible at-home healthcare products for patients worldwide.
summary.zh: 為全球患者開發平價且易取得的居家照護產品。

highlight.en: Its first product, HeartWatch, enables 24/7 at-home heart monitoring with a built-in emergency contact system.
highlight.zh: 首款產品 HeartWatch 提供 24 小時居家心臟監測,並內建緊急聯絡系統。

summary.en: Helps commercial insurance brokers structure complicated deals online.
summary.zh: 協助商業保險經紀人在線上架構複雜交易。

highlight.en: Targets hard-to-insure items like oil rigs, letting companies collaborate to create enforceable contracts with a dash of blockchain.
highlight.zh: 鎖定油井等難以承保的標的,讓企業以區塊鏈協作建立可執行的合約。

summary.en: A social media management tool that connects brands, agencies and influencers across Instagram and Snapchat.
summary.zh: 連結品牌、創意代理商與網紅於 Instagram 與 Snapchat 的社群媒體管理工具。

highlight.en: Automatically syncs stories between Instagram and Snapchat and adds analytics and scheduling to remove manual cross-platform work.
highlight.zh: 自動在 Instagram 與 Snapchat 間同步限時動態,並加入分析與排程以省去手動跨平台作業。

summary.en: An app for Indians to invest in and track mutual funds in a few clicks.
summary.zh: 讓印度人幾下點擊就能投資與追蹤共同基金的 App。

highlight.en: Lets users invest in any Indian fund without paying middleman commissions, keeping more of their returns.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者投資任何印度基金而免付中間人佣金,保留更多報酬。

summary.en: A chatbot that helps users find the best electronic music events in a single message.
summary.zh: 透過一則訊息協助使用者尋找最佳電子音樂活動的聊天機器人。

highlight.en: Surfaces live music events through chat, building a messaging bot before chatbots became mainstream.
highlight.zh: 透過聊天找出現場音樂活動,在聊天機器人成為主流前就率先打造。

summary.en: A personal finance app that lets couples track bills, bank balances and spending together.
summary.zh: 讓伴侶一同追蹤帳單、銀行餘額與支出的個人理財 App。

highlight.en: Designed to help couples manage money jointly and have meaningful conversations about their goals and habits.
highlight.zh: 專為協助伴侶共同管理金錢,並就財務目標與習慣展開有意義對話而設計。

summary.en: A direct-to-consumer fashion brand.
summary.zh: 直接面向消費者的時尚品牌。

highlight.en: Sells fashion straight to shoppers under a direct-to-consumer model.
highlight.zh: 以直接面向消費者的模式,將時尚商品直接銷售給購物者。

summary.en: Produces voice apps for Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant.
summary.zh: 為 Amazon Alexa 與 Google Assistant 製作語音應用。

highlight.en: Builds voice experiences for the major smart-assistant platforms, Amazon Alexa and Google Home.
highlight.zh: 為 Amazon Alexa 與 Google Home 等主要智慧助理平台打造語音體驗。

summary.en: Built real-time messaging and video creation products that reached global audiences.
summary.zh: 打造觸及全球使用者的即時通訊與影片創作產品。

highlight.en: Its NLP-driven API auto-generated GIF replies from text across Messenger, Viber, Telegram and Slack, serving millions of requests a day.
highlight.zh: 其 NLP 驅動的 API 能依文字自動生成 GIF 回覆,橫跨 Messenger、Viber、Telegram、Slack,每日服務數百萬次請求。

summary.en: An AI-powered community serving the over one billion people worldwide who have a criminal record.
summary.zh: 服務全球逾十億有犯罪紀錄者的 AI 驅動社群。

highlight.en: Rising from 70 Million Jobs, it gives each user an agentic agent that applies for jobs and housing, makes referrals and provides training.
highlight.zh: 由 70 Million Jobs 轉型而來,為每位使用者配備能申請工作與住房、轉介並提供培訓的智能代理。

summary.en: An on-demand tailoring service, described as the Uber for tailoring.
summary.zh: 隨選裁縫服務,被形容為裁縫界的 Uber。

highlight.en: Operating as Captain Tailor, it brings tailoring to customers on demand in the style of ride-hailing apps.
highlight.zh: 以 Captain Tailor 之名,仿照叫車 App 模式提供隨選到府的裁縫服務。

summary.en: An industrials company (details not provided in the source).
summary.zh: 一家工業領域公司(來源未提供進一步細節)。

highlight.en: A US-based industrials startup from the Summer 2017 batch; no further description is available in the source.
highlight.zh: 來自 2017 年夏季梯次、位於美國的工業新創,來源未提供更多說明。

summary.en: Reimagines water supply with solar-powered desalination, aiming for a fully sustainable water service.
summary.zh: 以太陽能海水淡化重新構想供水,致力打造完全永續的供水服務。

highlight.en: Now Wacomet Water, it turns salt water into fresh water and distributes it via a peer-to-peer platform called Liquid.
highlight.zh: 現為 Wacomet Water,將海水轉為淡水,並透過名為 Liquid 的點對點平台配送。

summary.en: A digital co-op renters insurance offering coverage at roughly half the price with an annual member dividend.
summary.zh: 以約半價提供保障並回饋年度會員紅利的數位合作社型租客保險。

highlight.en: As a Managing General Agent, it pools member premiums to pay claims, keeps a fixed fee and returns the surplus to members.
highlight.zh: 作為總代理商,匯集會員保費以支付理賠,僅收固定費用,並將剩餘部分回饋會員。

summary.en: An email-based personal assistant that sends you reminders at exactly the right moment.
summary.zh: 以 Email 為基礎、在恰當時機寄回提醒的個人助理。

highlight.en: Email any address like {any-time}@followupthen.com and get it back at that time, with advanced syntax for sales follow-ups and inbox zero.
highlight.zh: 寄信至 {任意時間}@followupthen.com,即可於該時間收回信件,並支援銷售追蹤與清空收件匣的進階語法。

summary.en: Customized fertility benefits that companies of any size can offer their employees.
summary.zh: 任何規模企業都能為員工提供的客製化生育福利。

highlight.en: Covers egg freezing, IVF and LGBT+ conception, focusing on the employee experience during high-impact fertility moments.
highlight.zh: 涵蓋凍卵、試管嬰兒與 LGBT+ 受孕,聚焦於生育關鍵時刻的員工體驗。

summary.en: Making sustainable farming easier to do.
summary.zh: 讓永續農業更容易實踐。

highlight.en: A US industrials startup focused on lowering the barriers to sustainable farming.
highlight.zh: 一家專注於降低永續農業門檻的美國工業新創。

summary.en: A mental health benefits platform for employers combining assessments, coaches and licensed therapists.
summary.zh: 為雇主打造、結合評估、教練與持照治療師的心理健康福利平台。

highlight.en: Has raised over $170M and supports 200+ companies including Lyft, Pixar, SoFi and Okta with evidence-based mental health support.
highlight.zh: 已募資逾 1.7 億美元,以實證心理健康支援服務 Lyft、Pixar、SoFi、Okta 等逾 200 家企業。

summary.en: No-code enterprise SaaS for automating financial control processes.
summary.zh: 用於自動化財務控管流程的無程式碼企業級 SaaS。

highlight.en: Empowers finops and accounting teams to automate and maintain financial control throughout the finops process without code.
highlight.zh: 讓財務營運與會計團隊無需寫程式,即可在財務營運流程中自動化並維護財務控管。

summary.en: Agile commission software to design, deploy and adapt sales commission plans.
summary.zh: 用於設計、部署與調整銷售佣金方案的敏捷佣金軟體。

highlight.en: Partners with companies like Carta, Intercom and Gong, and has raised $63M from investors including Sequoia and Accel.
highlight.zh: 與 Carta、Intercom、Gong 等公司合作,並已自 Sequoia、Accel 等投資者募資 6,300 萬美元。

summary.en: Robotic systems for wind turbine maintenance.
summary.zh: 用於風力渦輪機維護的機器人系統。

highlight.en: Its robots perform lightning conductivity testing, high-resolution inspection, drainage cleaning, painting and leading-edge repair on turbine blades.
highlight.zh: 其機器人可對渦輪葉片進行雷電導電測試、高解析檢測、排水孔清潔、上漆與前緣修復。

summary.en: A contact center AI platform that analyzes calls and streamlines quality assurance.
summary.zh: 分析通話並簡化品質管理流程的客服中心 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Transcribes 100% of calls and coaches agents, trusted by 150+ customers including Tripadvisor, Pearson and Root Insurance.
highlight.zh: 轉錄全部通話並輔導客服人員,獲 Tripadvisor、Pearson、Root Insurance 等逾 150 家客戶信賴。

summary.en: A web-based graphics tool that lets scientists create professional scientific figures, like Figma or Canva for science.
summary.zh: 讓科學家製作專業科學圖表的網頁繪圖工具,有如科學版的 Figma 或 Canva。

highlight.en: Billed as the world's first tool for scientists to create and share beautiful figures, on a mission to accelerate science communication.
highlight.zh: 號稱全球首款讓科學家製作並分享精美圖表的工具,致力加速科學溝通。

summary.en: Uses 3D printing, robotics and automation to build beautiful, sustainable, high-quality homes.
summary.zh: 運用 3D 列印、機器人與自動化打造美觀、永續且高品質住宅。

highlight.en: Founded by physicists and robotics engineers, it invented a material that lets an entire building be 3D-printed in a single cycle.
highlight.zh: 由物理學家與機器人工程師創立,發明的材料能在單一週期內 3D 列印整棟建築。

summary.en: An AI content platform that helps creators and companies expand their creative output.
summary.zh: 協助創作者與企業擴展創作產能的 AI 內容平台。

highlight.en: Launched February 2021, it serves over 105,000 active customers who use it to overcome writer's block and adjust tone.
highlight.zh: 於 2021 年 2 月推出,已服務逾 105,000 名活躍客戶,用於突破寫作瓶頸與調整語氣。

summary.en: The world's first digital clinic for substance use management.
summary.zh: 全球首家用於物質使用管理的數位診所。

highlight.en: Formerly Quit Genius, it delivers CBT and medication-assisted treatment for tobacco, alcohol and opioids, helping 750,000+ members.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Quit Genius,以認知行為療法與藥物輔助治療處理菸、酒與鴉片類物質,已協助逾 75 萬名會員。

summary.en: A modern law firm for startups powered by proprietary technology.
summary.zh: 以自有技術驅動、服務新創的新型態律師事務所。

highlight.en: Built software called Atrium LTS to drive efficiency and transparency and to move away from billing by the hour.
highlight.zh: 打造名為 Atrium LTS 的軟體以提升效率與透明度,並擺脫按小時計費的模式。

summary.en: Builds new materials and software to enable better textiles.
summary.zh: 開發新材料與軟體以打造更優質的紡織品。

highlight.en: Best known for Sheertex, a knit made from one of the world's strongest polymers that produces nearly indestructible pantyhose.
highlight.zh: 以 Sheertex 聞名,該針織物以全球最強韌聚合物之一製成,做出幾乎不會勾破的褲襪。

summary.en: A learning and development company that helps employers manage and measure employee growth at scale.
summary.zh: 協助雇主大規模管理與衡量員工成長的學習發展公司。

highlight.en: Draws from a pool of over 6,000 mentors and coaches to pair with high performers and new managers across the organization.
highlight.zh: 從逾 6,000 名導師與教練的人才庫中,為高績效者與新任主管配對輔導。

summary.en: Health insurance and benefits built for remote teams and digital nomads.
summary.zh: 為遠端團隊與數位遊牧者打造的健康保險與福利。

highlight.en: Building a global social safety net of health, insurance and retirement products meant to replace national welfare systems.
highlight.zh: 打造由健康、保險與退休產品組成的全球社會安全網,旨在取代各國福利制度。

summary.en: An AI partner for North American truckload freight serving manufacturers, retailers and shippers.
summary.zh: 為製造商、零售商與貨主服務的北美整車貨運 AI 夥伴。

highlight.en: Gives access to 300K+ carriers and 12+ AI agents automating 70%+ of touchpoints, backed by $85M+ from QED, Tiger Global and NFX.
highlight.zh: 提供逾 30 萬家承運商與逾 12 個 AI 代理、自動化超過 70% 接觸點,並獲 QED、Tiger Global、NFX 等逾 8,500 萬美元支持。

summary.en: An embedded banking software platform and marketplace connecting enterprises to banks and product partners.
summary.zh: 連結企業、銀行與產品夥伴的嵌入式銀行軟體平台與市集。

highlight.en: Its banking API lets fintechs and banks build modern financial products; won Tearsheet's Best Banking-as-a-Service award in 2021 and 2022.
highlight.zh: 其銀行 API 讓金融科技與銀行打造現代化金融產品,並於 2021、2022 年獲 Tearsheet 最佳 BaaS 平台獎。

summary.en: Cloud-based payroll and HR software built for companies in Latin America.
summary.zh: 專為拉丁美洲企業打造的雲端薪資與人資軟體。

highlight.en: Combines payroll, HR, time tracking, performance management and reporting for Latin American companies in one platform.
highlight.zh: 在單一平台整合拉丁美洲企業的薪資、人資、出勤、績效管理與報表功能。

summary.en: An ecommerce experience platform that helps brands build and optimize their online stores.
summary.zh: 協助品牌建立與優化線上商店的電商體驗平台。

highlight.en: Its Page Builder and Frontend products integrate with Shopify and BigCommerce, serving 20,000+ customers like Leesa and Chubbies.
highlight.zh: 其 Page Builder 與 Frontend 產品可整合 Shopify 與 BigCommerce,服務 Leesa、Chubbies 等逾 2 萬名客戶。

summary.en: A place for independent writing where anyone can start a newsletter and earn from subscriptions.
summary.zh: 供獨立寫作的平台,任何人都能開設電子報並從訂閱賺取收入。

highlight.en: Publishing is free with no limits, and Substack only makes money when writers earn from their subscribers.
highlight.zh: 發布免費且無上限,只有當寫作者從訂閱者賺錢時 Substack 才有收入。

summary.en: Digital financial services that expand education financing for students in Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 擴大東南亞學生教育融資的數位金融服務。

highlight.en: Operating as Danacita in Indonesia and Bukas in the Philippines, it helps underserved students pay for school and build credit.
highlight.zh: 以印尼的 Danacita 與菲律賓的 Bukas 營運,協助弱勢學生支付學費並建立信用紀錄。

summary.en: A blockchain security company providing auditing and protection for Web3 projects.
summary.zh: 為 Web3 專案提供稽核與防護的區塊鏈安全公司。

highlight.en: Has protected billions in digital assets through hundreds of audits for top projects including Aave, Compound, Maker and OpenSea.
highlight.zh: 透過數百次稽核保護數十億美元數位資產,客戶包含 Aave、Compound、Maker、OpenSea 等頂尖專案。

summary.en: Automated bookkeeping, tax filing and tax credits for over 1,000 startups.
summary.zh: 為逾 1,000 家新創自動處理記帳、報稅與稅務抵免。

highlight.en: Optimizes and files taxes to get startups cash back from the IRS, averaging $21k and up to $500k per year.
highlight.zh: 優化並申報稅務,助新創向美國國稅局取回現金,平均 2.1 萬美元、每年最高 50 萬美元。

summary.en: Better payment systems for governments and the communities they serve.
summary.zh: 為政府及其服務的社區打造更完善的支付系統。

highlight.en: Modernizes government payments so agencies recover more revenue while residents get flexible, humane ways to pay.
highlight.zh: 現代化政府收款,讓機關回收更多收入,同時提供居民彈性而人性化的繳款方式。

summary.en: Builds AI games and entertainment experiences for TVs.
summary.zh: 為電視打造 AI 遊戲與娛樂體驗。

highlight.en: Formerly Volley, its TV games include Song Quiz, Jeopardy!, Wheel of Fortune and Wit's End, founded by Max Child and James Wilsterman.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Volley,電視遊戲包含 Song Quiz、Jeopardy!、Wheel of Fortune 與 Wit's End,由 Max Child 與 James Wilsterman 創立。

summary.en: An online marketplace for experiences, starting with mass-participation sports events, that gets people offline.
summary.zh: 以大眾參與型運動賽事起步、讓人走出戶外的線上體驗市集。

highlight.en: Frames itself as the online company that gets everyone offline, beginning with a marketplace for mass participation sports events.
highlight.zh: 自詡為讓人們走到線下的線上公司,從大眾參與型運動賽事市集起步。

summary.en: A non-custodial marketplace for trading digital assets and other onchain items.
summary.zh: 用於交易數位資產與其他鏈上物品的非託管市集。

highlight.en: Founded in 2017, it pioneered the first non-custodial marketplace for digital assets and trades tokens and assets across major blockchains.
highlight.zh: 創立於 2017 年,首創數位資產的非託管市集,並可跨主要區塊鏈交易代幣與資產。

summary.en: Cryptocurrency portfolio tracking and tax compliance for consumers and businesses.
summary.zh: 為消費者與企業提供加密貨幣投資組合追蹤與稅務合規。

highlight.en: Lets users seamlessly track their crypto portfolio, investment performance and taxes from a globally distributed team.
highlight.zh: 由全球分散團隊打造,讓使用者無縫追蹤加密投資組合、投資績效與稅務。

summary.en: A collaborative, browser-based IDE for learning, creating and deploying software.
summary.zh: 用於學習、創作與部署軟體的協作式瀏覽器內 IDE。

highlight.en: A leading browser-based development environment serving a community of more than 20 million developers.
highlight.zh: 領先的瀏覽器內開發環境,服務逾 2,000 萬名開發者社群。

summary.en: Software that lets organizations run applications and data securely on any infrastructure.
summary.zh: 讓組織在任何基礎架構上安全執行應用與資料的軟體。

highlight.en: Lets IT lift and shift apps into hardware-encrypted secure enclaves spanning memory, storage and clouds without recoding.
highlight.zh: 讓 IT 將應用平移至橫跨記憶體、儲存與雲端的硬體加密安全飛地,且無需重寫程式。

summary.en: Uses AI, data and personalization to disrupt consumer packaged goods, starting with skincare.
summary.zh: 運用 AI、數據與個人化顛覆消費性包裝商品,從護膚品起步。

highlight.en: Creates skincare from 47+ factors using its Skin Genome Project database, which won MIT's AI Technology of the Year award.
highlight.zh: 依逾 47 項因素並運用其 Skin Genome Project 資料庫客製護膚品,該資料庫曾獲 MIT 年度 AI 技術獎。

summary.en: A self-maintaining knowledge base that keeps team docs in sync with reality.
summary.zh: 能讓團隊文件與現況保持同步的自我維護知識庫。

highlight.en: Pairs a verified knowledge base with an AI agent connected to team tools that detects and updates outdated docs automatically.
highlight.zh: 結合經驗證的知識庫與連接團隊工具的 AI 代理,自動偵測並更新過時的文件。

summary.en: Makes affordable, easy-to-use AI-powered industrial robotic arms for small businesses.
summary.zh: 為小型企業製造平價、易用且 AI 驅動的工業機器手臂。

highlight.en: Its robot arms can be programmed with natural language prompts and cost a fraction of human labor.
highlight.zh: 其機器手臂可用自然語言指令編程,成本僅為人力的一小部分。

summary.en: Grows cells for biotech companies to help them run experiments and develop manufacturing processes faster.
summary.zh: 為生技公司培養細胞,協助其更快進行實驗與開發製程。

highlight.en: Built proprietary software and automation to run bioreactors more efficiently, plus tools to help customers analyze their data.
highlight.zh: 打造自有軟體與自動化以更高效運作生物反應器,並提供工具協助客戶分析數據。

summary.en: An app to order ahead at restaurants while collecting rewards and sending gifts to friends.
summary.zh: 可預先點餐、累積回饋並向朋友送禮的餐廳 App。

highlight.en: Makes ordering food more convenient, affordable and social by letting users skip the line, earn points and gift friends.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者免排隊、累積點數並送禮給朋友,使點餐更便利、實惠且具社交性。

summary.en: A machine learning community marketing tool that helps brands engage their top fans.
summary.zh: 協助品牌經營頂級粉絲的機器學習社群行銷工具。

highlight.en: Identifies the top 1% of a brand's social following and turns them into active advocates who create authentic peer-to-peer content.
highlight.zh: 找出品牌社群粉絲中前 1% 的人,並將他們轉化為創作真實點對點內容的主動推廣者。

summary.en: Makes it easy for startups to hire vetted offshore engineers.
summary.zh: 讓新創輕鬆聘用經審核的離岸工程師。

highlight.en: Has helped 60+ YC startups hire from a talent pool of offshore developers not listed on freelance portals or job boards.
highlight.zh: 已協助逾 60 家 YC 新創,自未列於外包平台或求職網的離岸開發者人才庫中聘才。

summary.en: A generative AI studio focused on making a great anime game.
summary.zh: 專注打造優質動漫遊戲的生成式 AI 工作室。

highlight.en: The team behind niji・journey, it explores how AI can help human artists create masterpieces in video games.
highlight.zh: 作為 niji・journey 的開發團隊,探索 AI 如何協助人類藝術家在電玩中創作傑作。

summary.en: An AI coach helping students prepare for the digital SAT and ACT to get into college.
summary.zh: 協助學生準備數位 SAT 與 ACT、考取大學的 AI 教練。

highlight.en: Spun out of Juni (YC W18) in January 2024, Acely has grown to $10M ARR with a lean 10-person team.
highlight.zh: 於 2024 年 1 月自 Juni(YC W18)分拆而出,以 10 人精實團隊成長至 1,000 萬美元年經常性收入。

summary.en: Personalized performance nutrition products backed by 1:1 Registered Dietitian support.
summary.zh: 由註冊營養師一對一支援的個人化運動營養產品。

highlight.en: Founded in 2017, it offers personalized protein, hydration and pre-workout, backed by Y Combinator, BrandProject and Courtside VC.
highlight.zh: 創立於 2017 年,提供個人化蛋白質、補水與運動前補給,並獲 Y Combinator、BrandProject、Courtside VC 支持。

summary.en: Predicts consumer opinion and measures the impact of content.
summary.zh: 預測消費者意見並衡量內容影響力。

highlight.en: Partners with leading brands and advocacy groups to change minds, behaviors and attitudes using its measurement platform.
highlight.zh: 與頂尖品牌及倡議團體合作,運用其衡量平台改變想法、行為與態度。

summary.en: Engineering next-generation, brain-penetrant cancer therapies.
summary.zh: 研發能穿透腦部的新一代癌症療法。

highlight.en: Focuses on developing brain-penetrant cancer treatments, a class of therapies able to reach tumors in the brain.
highlight.zh: 專注開發能穿透腦部的癌症療法,這類療法可觸及腦部腫瘤。

summary.en: Commercializes patented drug delivery systems for RNA therapeutics.
summary.zh: 將其專利的 RNA 療法藥物遞送系統商業化。

highlight.en: Its delivery systems target RNA therapeutics such as siRNAs for gene silencing and mRNAs for gene expression.
highlight.zh: 其遞送系統針對 siRNA 基因沉默與 mRNA 基因表現等 RNA 療法。

summary.en: An AI-powered platform that helps professional service firms create remarkable client experiences.
summary.zh: 協助專業服務公司打造出色客戶體驗的 AI 驅動平台。

highlight.en: Gives clients a branded portal for tasks, payments, messages and contracts, plus a CRM and AI Assistant with full client context.
highlight.zh: 為客戶提供整合任務、付款、訊息與合約的品牌入口,並附帶具完整客戶脈絡的 CRM 與 AI 助理。

summary.en: A job-ready training program that teaches in-demand networking skills for IT careers.
summary.zh: 教授熱門網路技能、為 IT 職涯做準備的就業導向培訓計畫。

highlight.en: Built by former Cisco and Arista engineers and Air Force instructors, it trains networking skills in 2-5 months with 1:1 mentorship.
highlight.zh: 由前 Cisco、Arista 工程師與空軍教官打造,以 2 至 5 個月搭配一對一指導培養網路技能。

summary.en: A website builder designed for phones, letting anyone build and sell from an iPhone, iPad or Mac.
summary.zh: 專為手機設計的網站建置工具,讓任何人都能在 iPhone、iPad 或 Mac 上建站並銷售。

highlight.en: A remote-first 20+ person team, YC W18, that has raised $17.2M from Google Ventures, General Catalyst and other investors.
highlight.zh: 逾 20 人的遠端優先團隊,屬 YC W18,已自 Google Ventures、General Catalyst 等投資者募資 1,720 萬美元。

summary.en: A credit bureau for the renting generation that reinvents credit reports for the rental industry.
summary.zh: 為租屋世代打造、重新設計租賃業信用報告的信用機構。

highlight.en: Helps landlords know who they're renting to while letting tenants build credit simply by paying their rent.
highlight.zh: 協助房東了解租客身分,同時讓房客只要按時繳租就能建立信用。

summary.en: Lets anyone build a rules-based investment strategy or index from any content on the web.
summary.zh: 讓任何人從網路上任何內容建立規則型投資策略或指數。

highlight.en: Formerly Delphia, it builds evidence-backed, deterministic investment strategies from a prompt in minutes, also used by advisors.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Delphia,可依提示在數分鐘內建立有實證依據、確定性的投資策略,顧問也會使用。

summary.en: Builds an audio platform bringing podcasts, audiobooks and meditations together for the curious.
summary.zh: 打造一個整合 podcast、有聲書與冥想內容、獻給好奇者的音訊平台。

highlight.en: Made by a team with 20+ years of combined audio experience, building a fast-growing podcast player backed by YC W18.
highlight.zh: 由擁有逾 20 年音訊經驗的團隊打造,開發成長快速的 podcast 播放器,獲 YC W18 支持。

summary.en: Provides psychotherapy through autonomous, personalized virtual reality sessions.
summary.zh: 透過自主且個人化的虛擬實境療程提供心理治療。

highlight.en: Its VR sessions add to traditional therapy, letting clients regain self-reliance while raising treatment efficiency and lowering cost.
highlight.zh: 其 VR 療程作為傳統治療的補充,讓個案重拾自主性,同時提升療效並降低成本。
